SCENARIO
♡ Location: Dirt road near the Crawford Farm
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Unfortunately your car breaks down - where you're coming from and whether or not you live in Salem's Patch is up to you. Mal notices you... the question is, do you notice him?

Additional Context: Mal is Missy and Bud's third child. He doesn't hide his face because he's ashamed and insecure, but because Fallow thinks he looks cuter that way. He likes small, adorable things, but don't be fooled - the Crawfords are all monsters in their own way.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, cannibalism, kidnapping, sexism, homophobia(? - possibly from the family because they are very traditional), possible violence/gore/murder/death, smegma, has a foot fetish, physical/verbal abuse in his past, undiagnosed bipolar disorder

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜

(ᵕ • ᴗ •) I don't think I can make all the Crawfords + the others I have planned before October ends... so I will probably continue posting them throughout November. I apologize for how I skip around from bot to bot instead of posting them consecutively. It's just how my brain works!
